forecast-period.text: Cloudy. The chance of fog this morning, mainly in the south. High chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely late this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Patchy morning fog. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, becoming less likely this afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers north of Hawker, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower west of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog east of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog east of Coober Pedy. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
